description: Create a new git branch from the current HEAD and set up the environment. Install pyyaml dependency needed for validation.
steps: Create a new branch named 'feat/add-engineering-skills-and-chinese-readme' from the current HEAD (optimize/credit-estimation-enhancement)
Run 'pip install pyyaml' to ensure the validation script dependency is available
Run the existing validation on one skill (skills/skills/hello-world) to confirm the baseline is green
acceptance_criteria: New branch 'feat/add-engineering-skills-and-chinese-readme' exists and is checked out
python3 skills-workshop/scripts/quick_validate.py skills/skills/hello-world outputs 'Skill is valid!'
findings: Repository had corrupted git objects from previous shallow clone; re-cloned with depth=10 to fix. pyyaml was already available after pip install. Validation baseline is green.
